purposes.description: Produce an energy-optimized, time-blocked daily schedule with top-3 priorities, hour-by-hour blocks, success criteria, and evening check-in template

primitives.evidence: Must decompose the day into time blocks, assign priorities to energy windows, and handle fixed commitments
Must satisfy multiple constraints: respect existing appointments, match task difficulty to energy levels, include buffer time, protect personal time
Must generate multi-section structured text with consistent formatting across time blocks
Must conform to a detailed output schema (exact section names, checkbox format, markdown structure) plus style and content constraints simultaneously
Must follow the 4-step process: gather context, identify top 3, build time-blocked schedule, apply constraints
Output template is 1-5KB of structured markdown with multiple sections and closing delimiters
